hypothesis: Adding a pre-push PHP lint check (php -l on all changed .php files) to the surface checklist will catch syntax errors locally before they reach CI, improving first-push pass rate. Basis: asset-404 race condition (primary historical failure) is now fixed by PR #20. PHP syntax errors are the next most likely failure mode in active WP theme development.
learning: Superseded by exp_1777269393_36auc (structural marker smoke test). PHP-lint hypothesis was subsumed — php -l gate landed via PR deploy workflow before this experiment started. Archived 2026-04-28 per cycle-7 cleanup.
